title: ProviderAssignment
description: Record of a provider-to-worker assignment. Captures which API provider was selected for a worker task, the selection metadata, and the outcome. Contains no secrets — only provider identifiers and concurrency snapshots.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version pinned to 1. Consumers must reject records with a different version.

assignmentId.description: Unique identifier for this assignment, e.g. 'assign-wave14-issue-525-001'.

taskId.description: Worker task id that received this assignment, matching the heartbeat taskId.

providerId.description: Identifier of the assigned provider from the provider pool policy (e.g. 'provider-default').

assignedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the provider was assigned to the worker.

releasedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the assignment was released (worker completed or failed). Null if still active.

issueNumber.description: GitHub issue number this task targets, if applicable.

prNumber.description: GitHub pull request number produced by this task, if applicable.

taskType.description: Type of task from the worker task contract.

actorRole.description: Worker role from the task contract rolePacket.

pmPhase.description: Wave or phase identifier for aggregating assignments across a planning cycle.

selectionStrategy.description: Algorithm used to select this provider. Matches the provider pool policy selection strategy.

providerStatus.description: Snapshot of provider state at assignment time.

currentConcurrency.description: Number of active workers on this provider when assigned.

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent workers allowed for this provider.

consecutiveFailures.description: Consecutive failure count at assignment time.

globalConcurrency.description: Snapshot of global pool state at assignment time.

totalActiveWorkers.description: Total workers across all providers when assigned.

availableProviders.description: Number of providers with available capacity.

assignmentMethod.description: How the provider id was communicated to the worker. Matches workerIntegration.providerAssignment.method in policy.

envVarName.description: Environment variable name used for the assignment, e.g. 'LIAN_PROVIDER_ID'. Null when method is not env-var.

outcome.description: Post-execution outcome for this assignment. Null if the task is still running.

failureClass.description: If failed, the failure classification from the provider pool taxonomy.

httpStatus.description: HTTP status code from the provider API, if applicable.

detail.description: Human-readable outcome detail. Must not contain secrets.

notes.description: Free-text annotation. Must not contain secrets, API keys, or tokens.
